data.name: Sweet Revenge
data.detailed_description:
甜蜜復仇》是一部成人專用的視覺小說，在這裡，過去無法忘懷，未來建立在誘惑、操縱和對正義的渴求上。

Simon 一直是被嘲笑的對象，現在他是擁有完美計劃的完美男人。他的復仇將是甜蜜的，而復仇的工具就是他的魅力、智慧和完美無瑕的身體。受歡迎的女孩、野心勃勃的老師、昔日狂妄的明星 - 所有曾經羞辱過他的人都將任他宰割。但是當遊戲玩得太過份時該怎麼辦？勝利與災難的界線又在哪裡？

您就是這場危險遊戲的中心。操控、引誘、利用、剝削、撕裂命運 - 或是在自己的遊戲中迷失自我。問題不在於您能否報仇... 而是當一切結束時，您還能剩下什麼。

遊戲特色：

扣人心弦的故事和主角的情感旅程： Simon 的故事充滿了緊張的時刻和情感經歷，從一開始就吸引人，一直到最後。

個性細膩的獨特角色： 每個角色都有自己的個性和動機，增加了遊戲的深度和真實感。

多彩的視覺風格與悅耳的配樂： 遊戲以生動的畫面和氛圍愉悅的音樂，創造出令人難忘的沉浸感。

親切且鼓舞人心的氛圍： 遊戲結合懸疑與個人啟示的時刻，創造出獨特的氛圍，啟發並吸引玩家。

data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間

data.name: Sweet Revenge
data.detailed_description:
Sweet Revenge is an adults-only visual novel where the past cannot be forgotten and the future is built on seduction, manipulation, and a thirst for justice.

Simon has been the object of ridicule, and now he's the perfect man with the perfect plan. His revenge will be sweet, and its tool will be his charm, intelligence and flawless body. Popular girls, ambitious teachers, cocky stars of the past - everyone who once humiliated him will be at his mercy. But what to do when the game goes too far? And where is the line between triumph and disaster?

You're at the center of this dangerous play. Manipulate, seduce, use, exploit, tear fates apart - or lose yourself in your own game. The question isn't whether you can get your revenge... It's what's left of you when it's all over.

Game Features:

A gripping story and emotional journey of the main character: Simon's story is full of tense moments and emotional experiences that are captivating from the beginning and hold on until the end.

Unique characters with elaborate personalities: Each character has their own personality and motivations, adding depth and realism to the game.

Colorful visual style and pleasant soundtrack: The game delights with vivid graphics and atmospheric music, creating an unforgettable immersion.

Intimate and inspiring atmosphere: The game combines suspense and moments of personal revelation to create a unique atmosphere that inspires and captivates.

  • Processor: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM

  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 600 MB available space

  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
